description: Systematically verify every claim in the 100-company Target Customers Notion database. Deep research each company, re-scan job boards, re-qualify against ICP, fix errors, flag unverified data, and add new companies discovered during research.

userStories.title: Verify Tier 1 remaining batch (5 companies)
userStories.description: As the verification system, I need to deep-research and verify 5 unverified Tier 1 companies.
acceptanceCriteria: Query Notion database (data_source_id: 2e2cef67-3196-8066-8f74-000b5a3d9de9) for Tier 1 companies where Claru Fit Analysis does NOT start with '✅ VERIFIED BATCH'
Select first 5 by company name alphabetically
For each company: deploy web-research-specialist agent to verify ALL fields with source URLs
For each company: visit actual careers/jobs page, find CURRENT job posting URLs, copy verbatim JD text for data/annotation roles
For each company: verify founder names, titles, current status with LinkedIn URLs
For each company: verify funding from press releases (not assumed)
For each company: verify contact email from a public source (mark VERIFIED/PATTERN/UNVERIFIED)
Compare research to current Notion values, document discrepancies

Re-qualify each company: score 0-2 on each dimension (model training evidence, data intensity, stage fit, buyer access, hiring signal). Tier 1 >= 8, Tier 2 = 6-7, Tier 3 = 4-5, Monitor = 2-3, Disqualified = hard-fail or <=1

Update Notion: overwrite Stage, Founder/POC, Contact Email, Notes with verified data. Rewrite Claru Fit Analysis starting with '✅ VERIFIED BATCH [date]' followed by sourced hiring signals and qualification score
If any company should change tier based on verified evidence, update Outreach Tier
Log batch results to progress.txt
userStories.notes:
STATELESS EXECUTION: This is iteration 1. Query Notion for Tier 1 companies where 'Claru Fit Analysis' does NOT start with '✅ VERIFIED BATCH'. Pick first 5 alphabetically. Skip these 10 already-verified companies: Parametric, Lightscreen AI, Tuesday Lab, CraftStory, Cerrion, Genesis AI, DYNA Robotics, Coram AI, Sereact, Protex AI.

NOTION CONFIG: data_source_id = 2e2cef67-3196-8066-8f74-000b5a3d9de9

SCORING RUBRIC (0-2 each, max 10):
- Model training evidence: 0=API wrapper/unknown, 1=likely trains models, 2=confirmed proprietary model training
- Data intensity: 0=no data need, 1=implicit need, 2=explicit data/annotation need (job posting or stated)
- Stage/team fit: 0=too big/too small, 1=borderline, 2=sweet spot (Seed-Series B, 5-100 people)
- Buyer access: 0=no contact/no intro, 1=generic email only, 2=verified founder email or warm intro
- Hiring signal: 0=no roles, 1=adjacent roles, 2=active data/annotation/labeling roles with URLs

TIER THRESHOLDS: >=8 Tier 1, 6-7 Tier 2, 4-5 Tier 3, 2-3 Monitor, <=1 or hard-fail Disqualified

HARD DISQUALIFIERS: competitor (sells data/annotation), acquired/shut down, Chinese-only investors with no intro path, university lab with no procurement budget

MINIMUM BAR FOR PRE-SEED: Keep if we know the backer AND what they build AND it maps to our ICP. Pre-seed robotics/foundation model companies ARE valid prospects.

ERROR HANDLING: If a company has no public website or insufficient info after 3 search attempts, set status to 'INSUFFICIENT_PUBLIC_INFO', downgrade to Monitor with reason. Preserve any partial verified facts.

If you discover a NEW company during research that fits our ICP, add it to Notion via mcp__notion__notion-create-pages with full enrichment.

SCORING RUBRIC (0-2 each, max 10):
- Model training evidence: 0=API wrapper/unknown, 1=likely trains models, 2=confirmed proprietary model training
- Data intensity: 0=no data need, 1=implicit need, 2=explicit data/annotation need (job posting or stated)
- Stage/team fit: 0=too big/too small, 1=borderline, 2=sweet spot (Seed-Series B, 5-100 people)
- Buyer access: 0=no contact/no intro, 1=generic email only, 2=verified founder email or warm intro

If all Tier 1 are verified, move to Tier 2 companies instead.

userStories.title: Final QA sweep + Outbound page update
userStories.description: As QA, I need to run a final consistency check and update the 1st Wave Outbound page if needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Query ALL companies from Notion
Check: every Tier 1/2/3 company has '✅ VERIFIED BATCH' in Claru Fit Analysis
Check: no 'via website' or generic emails in Tier 1 companies
Check: Outreach Tier consistent with qualification scores
Check: Priority consistent with Outreach Tier (no Tier 1 + Low, no Disqualified + High)
Check: no Disqualified companies with verified hiring signals for data/annotation (should have been upgraded)

If any newly discovered or upgraded companies are stronger outreach targets than the current 10 in the Outbound page, update the 1st Wave Outbound Notion page (page_id: 321cef67319680e3b396f578aa92f62c)
Generate summary: total verified, tier changes, new companies added, discrepancies fixed
Log final summary to progress.txt
userStories.notes:
FINAL STORY. Query all companies. Run consistency checks. If verification produced stronger outreach candidates than the current Outbound page top 10, update that page.
